title: Xuzhou, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Xuzhou, Jiangsu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Xuzhou is a city in Jiangsu with a population of 9,083,000. A historic city in northern Jiangsu, a key transportation hub known for its Han dynasty heritage and coal mining history.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
